cost.noIngestsInWindow: No ingests in this window yet.
cost.noSourcesInWindow: No sources with ingest history in this window yet.

shadow.toggle: Include shadow estimate for pre-F149 ingests
shadow.hint: Overlay a rough Sonnet-API estimate on top of real cost for jobs that ran before cost-tracking was enabled. ±30–50% margin.
shadow.available: {amount} in estimates available — click to show
shadow.realZeroNote: Actual out-of-pocket cost for these jobs was 0 (Max Plan).

quality.title: Ingest comparison
quality.noRuns: No ingest runs yet. The source is either uploaded but not yet processed, or processed before F149's cost-tracking was enabled.

diff.hint: See exactly which lines this candidate changes on the existing Neuron
diff.identical: The candidate changes no lines on the existing Neuron.

kindHints.chat-answer: A chat answer the curator chose to save as a Neuron.
kindHints.ingest-summary: A Neuron the compiler wrote from a Source during ingest.
kindHints.ingest-page-update: An edit to an existing Neuron emitted during ingest.
kindHints.cross-ref-suggestion: A cross-reference or orphan finding from lint — a Neuron without citations or a Source nothing links to.
kindHints.contradiction-alert: Two Neurons whose claims conflict. Curator picks which side wins.
kindHints.gap-detection: A question the knowledge base couldn't answer well — suggests adding a Source.
kindHints.user-correction: A direct edit the curator submitted via the Neuron editor.
kindHints.reader-feedback: A reader flagged an answer as wrong or incomplete.
kindHints.external-feed: A candidate posted by an external pipeline (e.g. buddy session artifacts).
kindHints.version-conflict: A concurrent-edit collision on a Neuron. Curator picks which version survives.
kindHints.source-retraction: A Source was marked untrustworthy — compiles from it need a second look.
kindHints.scheduled-recompile: A periodic recompile of an existing Neuron to pick up new evidence.

statusHints.approved: The curator accepted this candidate — its change is committed.
statusHints.rejected: The curator discarded this candidate. Nothing changed.
statusHints.ingested: The candidate's content has landed as a Neuron.
statusHints.autoApproved: Trusted pipeline — the approval policy auto-committed this. No human click needed.

opHints.create: Approving this candidate creates a new Neuron.
opHints.update: Approving this candidate edits an existing Neuron in place.
opHints.archive: Approving this candidate archives (soft-deletes) a Neuron.

confidenceTierHints.high: High confidence — eligible for auto-approval at ≥ 0.8.
confidenceTierHints.medium: Medium confidence — worth a manual review.

bulk.acceptRecommendationsHint: {ready} of {total} selected candidates have a ready recommendation. Rows without one (still computing) or with a reject-recommendation are skipped.
bulk.approveDisabledRich: One or more selected items need a specific choice (contradiction, orphan, stale) — handle those one at a time.

item.reopenHint: Puts this candidate back in the Pending queue so you can decide again.
item.autoLinkNoSources: Auto-link couldn't find a clear match. Open the editor and pick sources yourself.

sources.title: Sources

duplicate.title: This file is already in this Trail
duplicate.body: {newFilename} has the exact same content as {existingFilename}, which is already a Source in this Trail. Skip the upload to avoid a duplicate, open the existing Source, or upload anyway as a separate row.
duplicate.hint: Detection is based on SHA-256 of the file bytes — same hash means byte-identical content (any difference, even a single byte, would not match).

empty.extracted: No sources in the extracted-but-empty state.
empty.success: No sources have produced Neurons yet.
empty.all: No sources yet. Drop a file anywhere on this page to upload.

sources.retryHint: Re-run the full pipeline (extract + ingest) against the uploaded bytes
sources.reingestHint: Extraction was successful — click to re-run trail's LLM Neuron compiler against the extracted content
sources.runVisionHint: Re-run Vision on this source's images that don't yet have descriptions
sources.reingestBody: This re-runs trail's LLM Neuron compiler against the existing extracted content. Expect it to take 1-2 minutes and use LLM tokens. Existing Neurons from this source will be replaced by the new compile.
sources.archiveHint: Archive this source — hidden from the list, data intact
sources.archiveBody: The source is hidden from the list but not permanently deleted — its data and metadata remain in the database. You can restore it from the Archived tab at any time.
sources.restoreHint: Bring this source back to the active list
sources.uploadHint: Drag & drop files to upload, or click to browse.

wikiTree.title: Neurons
wikiTree.empty: No Neurons yet. Candidates that pass the queue appear here.
wikiTree.runLintHint: Scan Neurons for orphans, stale pages, and contradictions
wikiTree.sortHint: Choose how Neurons are ordered in the list
wikiTree.emptyFiltered: No Neurons match the selected tags. Clear filters to see everything.
wikiTree.newNeuronHint: Create a new Neuron manually — lands in queue for review

newNeuronModal.title: New Neuron
newNeuronModal.contentPlaceholder: Markdown body (optional — you can edit it after approval)

graph.edgeTypeToggleHint: Click to toggle this relation type
graph.emptyBody: Add more Neurons to see your Trail take shape. The graph needs at least two connected Neurons to render.

kbs.title: Trails
kbs.empty: No Trails yet. Create one to get started.

newTrail.title: Create a new Trail
newTrail.descriptionPlaceholder: What knowledge should this Trail collect?

lintPolicy.label: Lint policy
lintPolicy.trustingHint: Trusting: rejected lint findings are suppressed permanently. No nag-loop on dismissed findings.
lintPolicy.strictHint: Strict: rejected lint findings may re-fire on the next lint pass. Catches wrongful dismissals at the cost of more noise.
lintPolicy.saveFailed: Couldn't save lint policy — {error}. Reloading current state.

hints.upload: A file dropped on the Sources page — PDF, Markdown, DOCX. The ingest pipeline compiled Neurons from it.
hints.mcp:claude-code: A Claude Code cc session wrote this Neuron via Trail MCP.
hints.mcp:cursor: A Cursor editor session wrote this via Trail MCP.
hints.mcp: An MCP client that didn't identify itself via TRAIL_CONNECTOR.
hints.buddy: Buddy piped in a cc-session artifact (F39). Session reasoning distilled into a reusable Neuron.
hints.chat: A saved chat answer — the curator asked Trail a question and pressed 'save as Neuron'.
hints.lint: A lint detector finding — orphan, stale, contradiction, or gap.
hints.curator: A direct edit by the curator via the Neuron editor.
hints.api: A bearer-authed POST from a script, CI hook, or webhook.
hints.slack: Planned ingest of Slack channel messages into Trail.
hints.discord: Planned ingest of Discord server messages into Trail.
hints.notion: Planned ingest of Notion pages into Trail.
hints.github: Planned ingest of GitHub issues, PRs, and discussions.
hints.linear: Planned ingest of Linear tickets and comments.

glossary.title: Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Every term the Trail admin uses, defined. A single source of truth — same definition everywhere.

errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.conflict: Can't do that — the item changed under your feet.

neuronEditor.discardBody: Your edits will not be saved. This cannot be undone.
neuronEditor.conflictBanner: The Neuron was edited since you opened it (v{current} vs v{expected}). Reload to see the latest version.

tagFilter.label: Tags:
tagFilter.empty: None of the candidates carry tags yet.

heuristic.hint: Heuristic Neurons carry a confidence score that decays over time unless they're edited or pinned. Below 0.3 they fade — chat excludes them so old rules-of-thumb don't contaminate new answers.

trail.title: Trail settings
trail.subtitle: Per-Trail configuration for {name}.
trail.nameHint: Display name for this Trail. Changing it doesn't affect the URL — the slug stays the same.
trail.descriptionPlaceholder: One or two sentences about what this Trail contains.
trail.languageHint: Language used for LLM-generated content on this Trail — Neuron compilation from Sources AND F96 action-recommender reasoning. The admin chrome stays in whatever language you picked in the top-right switcher; only the content follows this setting.

personas.title: Chat personas (external integrations)
personas.subtitle: When this Trail is queried via Bearer-token chat (e.g. an embedded widget or a site-LLM orchestrator), these snippets are appended to the base persona-template. Leave empty to use the defaults.
personas.toolPlaceholder: ALWAYS speak about this domain from a clinical-neutral position; never recommend booking or actions.
personas.toolHint: For site-LLMs that fetch Trail content as one tool among many. Keep prose factual — your orchestrator handles tone + actions.
personas.publicPlaceholder: Du er Sanne Andersen, zoneterapeut i Aalborg. Booking via sanne-andersen.dk/book. Tone: varm, dansk, du-form.
personas.publicHint: For chat widgets that render Trail's answer directly to end-users. Establish identity, voice, and what to suggest as a natural next step.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Your profile, tenant, and device-local preferences.
account.name: Name
account.ambientEnabled: Play ambient loops while I work

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Bearer tokens for integrating Trail with external sites and scripts.
apiKeys.empty: You haven't created any API keys yet.
apiKeys.createHint: Give the key a descriptive name so you remember what it's for.
apiKeys.revealWarning: You will see this key only ONCE. Copy it now into your password manager or your integration's config.
apiKeys.copyFailed: Couldn't access the clipboard — select the key above and copy it manually.
apiKeys.revokeBody: Revoke {name}? Existing integrations using this key will get 401.

linkReport.title: Link Check
linkReport.subtitle: Broken [[wiki-links]] in this Trail's Neurons. Accept the suggested fix to rewrite the link, dismiss to mark as intentional, or rescan to recheck after bulk edits.
linkReport.empty: No broken links — your Trail is intact.
linkReport.acceptDismissed: Link no longer present — dismissed instead

work.title: Work
work.subtitle: Tasks, bugs, milestones and decisions living alongside the knowledge on this Trail — with context automatically inherited from related Neurons via [[neuron-links]].

field.title: Title
field.contentHint: Markdown. Use [[neuron-slug]] to link to related knowledge — context is inherited automatically in chat + compile.
